adapters.name: OSM walkability and accessibility proxies
adapters.proxyCaveat: OpenStreetMap tag-count proxies around the representative town coordinate. They are not formal accessibility audits, sidewalk inventories, route guarantees, or service availability claims.

adapters.name: OSM feature plus OSRM route proxies
adapters.proxyCaveat: OSM feature discovery plus OSRM route-time proxy. It is not an official hospital registry, emergency access guarantee, ferry timetable, ticketing, traffic, or seasonal-service claim.

adapters.name: Open-Meteo gridded environment proxies
adapters.proxyCaveat: Open-Meteo grid samples. They are not regulatory monitoring-station observations, indoor-air measures, live weather alerts, road-safety claims, or medical advice.

adapters.name: OSM outdoor mapped-feature proxies
adapters.proxyCaveat: Mapped-feature counts and geometry lengths. They are not access-rights, safety, maintenance, wave-quality, snow-cover, legal-access, or current-condition claims.

adapters.name: OSM street graph plus Open-Meteo elevation terrain proxies
adapters.proxyCaveat: DEM samples over mapped OSM street and footway segments. They are not parcel, flood, mobility, accessibility, route-quality, or stroller-suitability assessments.

adapters.name: OSM mapped-peak proximity proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: OSM natural=peak nodes with elevation tags. This is not an official DEM peak inventory, hiking access, route time, safety, weather, rescue, or property-risk claim.

adapters.name: OSM protected-area distance proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Derived from existing cited OSM protected-area overlap evidence. It is not WDPA, Natura 2000, IUCN Category II, legal national-park, public-access, route-time, habitat-quality, safety, or recreation-quality evidence.

adapters.name: Derived OSM green urban proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Derived from cited OSM green_space_pct rows. It is not Copernicus Urban Atlas, functional urban area coverage, public-park access, tree canopy, shade, ecological quality, legal open-space inventory, or a guarantee of usable green space.

adapters.name: Derived scenery tag proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Derived from cited coast-distance, mapped-peak proximity, mapped green-space, protected-area distance, and bathing-water rows. It is not a subjective beauty score, forest-cover value, lake or plain classification, route/safety/accessibility claim, or site-specific environmental assessment.

adapters.name: Derived family amenity density proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Derived from already cited OSM component rows. It is not childcare availability, school quality, admissions, paediatric care, safety, stroller-route, park-usability, opening-hours, or family suitability advice.

adapters.name: Official Blue Flag awarded beaches list
adapters.proxyCaveat: Official annual award-list counts. Municipality rows are not town-radius counts, Heraklion is regional-unit context, and no row is beach-accessibility, safety, bathing-water-quality, or unmonitored-beach evidence.

adapters.name: SEATRAC accessible beach directory
adapters.proxyCaveat: SEATRAC directory counts of entries marked Online at verification time. They are not full accessible-beach inventories, formal accessibility audits, route or parking guarantees, sea-state claims, assistance-service guarantees, safety claims, or proof that unmatched beaches are inaccessible.

adapters.name: Open-Meteo UV-index grid proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Open-Meteo prior-calendar-year hourly UV-index grid proxy converted to monthly mean daily maxima. It is not a TEMIS long-term UV climatology, current forecast, medical advice, personal exposure measure, beach-safety claim, sunburn-risk advice, or microclimate guarantee.

adapters.name: OSM and OSRM KEP access proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Mapped KEP or citizen-service feature plus OSRM route-time proxy. It is not an official KEP registry, service-area assignment, appointment availability, opening-hours, processing-time, eligibility, language-access, or legal or administrative advice claim.

adapters.name: AADE tax-office address and OSRM access proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: AADE tax-office address evidence plus OSRM route-time proxy. It is not an official tax-office assignment, jurisdiction map, appointment availability, opening-hours, processing-time, eligibility, tax-residency determination, tax obligation, or tax advice claim.

adapters.name: Crete residence-permit office address and OSRM access proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Official Decentralized Administration of Crete residence-permit office-address evidence plus OSRM route-time proxy. It is not an official service-area assignment, appointment availability, opening-hours, processing-time, eligibility, visa or residence-route qualification, application outcome, legal advice, immigration advice, or administrative advice claim.

adapters.name: Hellenic Cadastre office address and OSRM access proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Hellenic Cadastre office-address evidence plus OSRM route-time proxy. It is not an official jurisdiction assignment, service-area assignment, appointment availability, opening-hours, processing-time, title, ownership, property-rights, legal-status, land-registration outcome, property advice, legal advice, or administrative advice claim.

adapters.name: Accredited European School address and OSRM access proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: European Schools accreditation/address evidence for the School of European Education Heraklion plus OSRM route-time proxy. It is not a complete international-school inventory, admission availability, tuition, curriculum fit, grade placement, special-education provision, school-bus service, commute guarantee, childcare availability, or education advice.

adapters.name: Selected European Schools-accredited public school tuition proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Selected tuition proxy for the European Schools-accredited public school already used by the international-school access row. It is not a median of all private international-school tuition in the town, admissions availability, grade placement, school-bus, meals, uniform, trips, exam-fee, support-service cost, or education advice.

adapters.name: Crete public duty-pharmacy rota pages
adapters.proxyCaveat: Public duty-pharmacy rota-page availability signal for priority Crete towns. It is not live opening-hours evidence, a 24/7 pharmacy-density measure, emergency care, stock, prescription, language, insurance, ambulance, clinical access, or medical advice. Dynamic duty rosters must be refreshed close to publication.

adapters.name: Crete official municipal and regional digital-service pages
adapters.proxyCaveat: Official municipal or regional e-service page presence signal. It is not a service-completeness audit, service-quality measure, appointment availability, processing time, account eligibility, accessibility, language support, or administrative advice claim.

adapters.name: Crete official KTEL bus-frequency proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Selected official KTEL timetable departure counts for priority Crete town spine corridors. It is not a full public-transport network score, local bus coverage audit, headway guarantee, real-time reliability measure, accessibility claim, ticket availability claim, strike or cancellation warning, door-to-door commute estimate, or transport advice. Refresh before publication because timetables are seasonal.

adapters.name: Chania Airport official summer direct-destination count
adapters.proxyCaveat: Official Chania/Fraport airport timetable endpoint count for CHQ outbound destination airports in the summer period ending 24 October 2026. It is not flight frequency, seats, fares, airline coverage, live operation, year-round availability, service guarantee, booking advice, or travel advice.

adapters.name: Manual or licensed airport and ferry seasonal schedule intake
adapters.proxyCaveat: Only accepts dated official timetable, official port or national ferry publication, manual browser/export read, or licensed schedule-feed records. Manual input records must be component rows only; airport_winter_route_ratio is derived after matching cited winter and summer counts exist for the same selected-airport basis. It is not frequency, seats, live operation, a service guarantee, booking advice, or travel advice.

adapters.name: OSM seasonal opening-hours proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: OpenStreetMap selected service, shop, and tourism features with opening_hours month/date ranges or seasonal tags. It is a low-confidence mapped-tag proxy, not a full winter-vs-summer service-drop-off measure, not business-hours proof, not proof services are open or closed, not resident-service availability, and not advice.

adapters.name: OSM emergency veterinary tag proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: OpenStreetMap veterinary features with explicit emergency, emergency-service, emergency opening-hours, 24/7 opening-hours, or emergency-speciality tags. It is a low-confidence mapped-tag proxy, not a complete veterinary directory, after-hours rota, emergency-service guarantee, opening-hours guarantee, clinical-quality measure, animal-health advice, or proof that untagged veterinary services do not offer emergency care.

adapters.name: Open-Meteo CAMS pollen severity proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Open-Meteo Air Quality API selected-species pollen grid values derived from CAMS. This is a medium-confidence gridded screening proxy, not a medical, diagnosis, treatment, allergy-risk, medication, current-forecast, personal-exposure, indoor-air, street-level vegetation, or neighbourhood microclimate claim.

adapters.name: ELIME annual cruise passenger pressure rows
adapters.proxyCaveat: Annual ELIME cruise-call and passenger-arrival port rows. These are port visit counts, not unique individuals, resident pressure, overnight-stay counts, ferry passengers, day-crowd distribution, port capacity, congestion, spending, or tourism-pressure advice.

adapters.name: Derived car-dependency screening proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Derived 0-100 screening proxy from already cited walkability, selected KTEL frequency, airport-drive, ferry-terminal-drive, family-amenity, and KEP-distance rows. It is not a car-ownership rate, commute advice, full local bus coverage audit, traffic or parking measure, accessibility guarantee, school-run suitability claim, night/weekend service measure, route guarantee, or transport advice.

adapters.name: Crete dated municipal and water-utility interruption notices
adapters.proxyCaveat: Official dated municipal or water-utility notice-history signal for priority Crete towns. The Crete parent is an accepted priority-town aggregate only, not a true island-wide regional restriction history. It is not a continuous water-stress baseline, current outage status, water-quality claim, utility-capacity assessment, household supply guarantee, future restriction prediction, legal or utility advice, or health advice.

adapters.name: WRI Aqueduct Crete baseline water-stress row
adapters.proxyCaveat: WRI Aqueduct 4.0 baseline annual water-stress category for the Crete regional row, inherited by priority towns. It is regional screening context, not household service, current outage, water-quality, utility-capacity, property-suitability, water-rights, future-restriction, legal, utility, or health advice.

adapters.name: OpenStreetMap mapped inland-water polygon proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Fallback mapped inland-water polygon proxy within 2 km representative-town circles, with sea/coast/pool/fountain exclusions and a priority-town regional summary. It is not JRC Global Surface Water, not a municipal or island-wide water-area value, not household service, water quality, drought, flood risk, beach access, parcel suitability, or legal, utility, health, or safety advice.

adapters.name: Copernicus/EEA HRL forest and tree-cover samples
adapters.proxyCaveat: Copernicus/EEA High Resolution Layer Forest Type and Tree Cover Density samples within 2 km representative-town circles, plus a priority-town regional summary. These are raster-sample proxies, not municipal or island-wide inventories, legal forest classifications, street-shade measures, public-access claims, wildfire-risk scores, safety advice, or property advice.

adapters.name: Zenodo/OpenGeoHub VIIRS nighttime-lights radiance proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: Samples the 2024 Zenodo/OpenGeoHub VIIRS nighttime-lights COG inside representative 2 km town circles and reports raw/10 as a NOAA-like radiance proxy; regional rows summarize priority-town samples. It is not a Bortle class, stargazing guarantee, streetlight inventory, safety advice, health advice, property advice, parcel measure, or neighborhood measure.

adapters.name: EDO CDI v4.1 drought-frequency grid-cell proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: European Drought Observatory CDI v4.1 nearest-grid-cell ten-day class-frequency proxy for priority Crete towns, plus a priority-town regional summary. It is not an island-wide drought frequency, municipal drought declaration, household water-service evidence, water-quality claim, utility-capacity assessment, forecast, property, safety, legal, utility, health, or personal advice.

adapters.name: OSM wildfire-context road-dependence proxy
adapters.proxyCaveat: OpenStreetMap mapped motor-road component sectors, dead-end node share, and the existing car-dependency proxy around representative town points, combined with the already cited national ThinkHazard wildfire context row. It is a low-confidence road-dependence proxy, not an EFFIS/GWIS fire-behaviour grid, evacuation route, emergency plan, road-capacity, live-traffic, closure, response-time, insurance, parcel, property, safety, legal, health, or personal advice claim.
